name: Crab Stuffed Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the chicken breasts; pound to flatten.
2. Sprinkle with a little salt and pepper.
3. Cook onion and celery in 3 tablespoons butter until tender.
4. Remove from heat; add white wine, crab, and stuffing mix, and toss.
5. Divide mixture among breasts. Roll up and secure.
6. Combine flour and paprika; coat chicken.
7. Place in an 11-inch X 7-inch X 2-inch baking dish, drizzle with 3 tablespoons melted butter.
8. Bake uncovered at 375°F for 1 hour.
9. Transfer to platter.
10. Blend Hollandaise sauce mix, milk. Cook, stirring until thick.
11. Add remaining white wine and cheese; stir until cheese melts.
12. Serve over chicken.
